prompt: Recreate the exact icon composition shown in the FIRST reference image (the EXP scroll reference): a 3D stylized rolled parchment scroll at a diagonal tilt with a narrow brown leather strap and small copper buckle wrapping around the middle, AND a HUGE oversized golden-yellow 'EXP' text boldly placed across the center of the scroll. REPLICATE the reference's proportions and layout precisely: each of the three letters E, X, P must be ENORMOUS — each letter's height occupies roughly 35-45% of the entire scroll icon's total height, so the three letters together completely dominate the composition and visually extend far beyond both top and bottom edges of the narrow strap. Letter placement follows the reference: arrange 'EXP' diagonally across the scroll following the strap's tilt angle, with each letter slightly staggered in height (E positioned slightly upper-left, X in the middle partially overlapping the copper buckle, P slightly lower-right), sitting ON TOP of both the strap and the parchment surface so the bottom halves of letters cover the scroll paper below the strap. Letter style: thick chunky sans-serif with clean 3D extruded sides, solid warm golden-yellow top faces with slightly darker orange-gold sides, subtle dark drop shadow on the scroll beneath each letter for grounding, simple clean look matching the reference (NO inner highlights, NO fancy outlines, keep it solid and flat-shaded 3D). Use the SECOND reference image for the scroll paper color (warm yellow-beige parchment) and buckle style (copper metallic). Fully transparent PNG background, centered composition, ONE SINGLE scroll icon, no extra elements, no additional text, polished 3D game UI icon quality.
